title: Glowing Ancient Debris
description: The Glowing Ancient Debris pack adds a blue glow to Ancient Debris, making it easier to spot in the Nether. It requires Optifine or a compatible alternative and doesn't change gameplay, just the block's appearance.
body:
**Glowing Ancient Debris – Easier to Spot in the Nether!**

This resource pack adds a blue glowing effect to the Ancient Debris block, making it much easier to find in the Nether. No more struggling to see it in the dark—now it stands out, even in low-light conditions!

**Features:**

- Adds a bright blue effect to Ancient Debris.
- Makes it significantly easier to spot while mining in the Nether
- Helps speed up Netherite farming without changing gameplay mechanics
  
**Requirements**:
- OptiFine or a compatible alternative (Continuity)
  
**How It Affects Gameplay:**

This pack provides a simple visual enhancement that makes Ancient Debris more visible in the Nether. It doesn’t change how the block functions—only how it looks—so it remains fully compatible with vanilla gameplay.

Enjoy!
